title: panicum tristachyum var. lineare
intro: Panicum tristachyum var. lineare, also known as the Narrow-leaved Panic Grass or a variety of Panic Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Panicum tristachyum var. lineare include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
